description: Plugin-distributed hooks for power-platform. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed.

hooks.comment: Advisory (opt-in): when a Bash command looks like a Dataverse Web API create/update (POST/PATCH to /api/data/vX.Y/<entityset>), nudges to run the dataverse-payload-preflight skill FIRST — validates every field against live metadata in one pass (nonexistent columns, option-set values, lookup binds, required fields, owner) instead of the fix-one-field-and-re-fire loop the Contoso retro suffered. No-op without .ravenclaude/comfort-posture.yaml; exits 0 always (never blocks); fail-safe. Honest limit: it can't know if the preflight already ran — it nudges on the create/update shape.

Advisory: Power Platform house-opinion violations (GUIDs in Power Fx, default publisher prefix, hard-coded tenant URLs, binary .pbix, flow Try/Catch, premium-connector licensing note, Power Fx var/col prefix, plaintext secret in env-var default). Advisory by default; flip the script's final exit 0 to exit 1 to enforce.

Advisory: on a *.tmdl edit, flags any Power BI measure missing a /// description, a formatString, or a displayFolder (the measure-metadata discipline; see best-practices/enforce-measure-metadata.md). Deterministic single-file structural check; advisory by default (flip the script's final exit 0 to exit 1 to enforce). Pattern credit: Data Goblins power-bi-agentic-development.

Advisory: on a Power Automate flow JSON edit (workflows/*.json), flags actions left with auto-generated default names (Compose_2, Apply_to_each_3, Condition, …) that should be renamed descriptively (see best-practices/name-flow-actions-descriptively.md). Deterministic; advisory by default (flip the script's final exit 0 to exit 1 to enforce). Pattern credit: Flow Studio power-automate-mcp-skills + Flow-Checker/BPA guidance.
